# Miralive
> Specjalistyczne doradztwo ubezpieczeniowe — ubezpieczenia zyciowe, zdrowotne, komunikacyjne i firmowe.

## Contact
- Address: ul. Dworcowa 12, 85-009 Bydgoszcz, kujawsko-pomorskie, Poland
- Phone: +48 500 123 456
- Email: kontakt@miralive.pl
- Website: https://miralive.pl

## Hours
- Mon-Fri: 09:00 - 17:00
- Sat: 10:00 - 13:00
- Sun: Closed

## About
Miralive is an insurance agency based in Bydgoszcz, Poland, led by Miroslawa Poniatowska. We specialize in life and health insurance, offering personalized advisory services. We compare offers from 20+ insurance companies to find the best coverage for individuals, families, and businesses.

## Services
- [Life & Health Insurance](https://miralive.pl/uslugi#ubezpieczenia-zyciowe) — income protection, critical illness, second medical opinion, savings plans, mortgage insurance
- [Auto Insurance](https://miralive.pl/uslugi#ubezpieczenia-komunikacyjne) — OC, AC, Assistance, NNW packages
- [Business Insurance](https://miralive.pl/uslugi#ubezpieczenia-firmowe) — professional liability, property, group life, fleet insurance
- [Medical Professional Liability](https://miralive.pl/uslugi#oc-medyczne) — OC for doctors, nurses, paramedics, physiotherapists
- [Property Insurance](https://miralive.pl/uslugi#ubezpieczenia-majatkowe) — homes, apartments, vacation homes
- [School & Travel Insurance](https://miralive.pl/uslugi#ubezpieczenia-szkolne) — NNW for children, travel insurance

## Insurance Partners
Vienna Life, Ergo Hestia, Generali, Allianz, PZU, WARTA, InterRisk, Inter Polska, UNIQA, Nationale-Nederlanden, COMPENSA, LINK4, Proama, WIENER, TUZ, AGRO TUW, Leadenhall, Prevoir, TRASTI, BEZPIECZNY
